The jocular, upbeat '''Tuchap''' was a race bookie and information broker in the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] underworld. Overweight and violently [[Allergy/Legends|allergic]] to [[Cigarra/Legends|cigarra]] smoke, the ordinarily jovial [[Farghul]]'s mood would turn frosty and hard-bitten towards those who disappointed him.<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds" />

{{Char-stub}}
